summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned because merge preflight is incomplete for all candidates; security-sensitive linked refs and the gateway auth PR are quarantined item-by-item.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive issue is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be handled by central OpenClaw security.
Security-sensitive historical PR is read-only context and should be routed to central security handling, not mutated.
The PR itself changes gateway auth behavior for a security-sensitive linked issue, so it must be quarantined with route_security for this exact PR rather than planned as needs_human.

Large feature PR has incomplete independent verification and a failing check, so merge is blocked. Because fix PRs are allowed and maintainer_can_modify=true, the executable path is to repair the contributor branch narrowly rather than replace it.

The PR is plausible and narrow, but merge is blocked by the ClawSweeper needs-changes finding and missing complete merge_preflight. Repair should remove or relocate the release-owned changelog edit and rerun narrow validation.
Product compatibility behavior for Discord bot-authored native replies plus failing checks and active author follow-up require maintainer judgment before merge or repair planning.
The fix is plausible but merge proof is incomplete. Repair should rerun targeted tests plus dependency/lockfile validation and complete review preflight before any merge recommendation.

needs_human: #80235 requires maintainer judgment on Discord compatibility behavior and failing checks after active author follow-up.
